topWPAPlays.description: Esmerlyn Valdez homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Endy Rodríguez scores.
Ernie Clement singles on a ground ball to left fielder Bryan Reynolds. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores. Yohendrick Piñango to 2nd.
Spencer Horwitz homers (5) on a fly ball to right field.
Oneil Cruz homers (11) on a fly ball to right field.
Yohendrick Piñango grounds into a double play, first baseman Spencer Horwitz to shortstop Jared Triolo to pitcher Mitch Keller. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 2nd. Yohendrick Piñango out at 1st.
Colton Cowser homers (2) on a fly ball to center field. Jackson Holliday scores. Leody Taveras scores.

Austin Martin doubles (9) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Jarren Duran. Orlando Arcia scores. Ryan Kreidler to 3rd.
Willson Contreras homers (11) on a fly ball to left field. Wilyer Abreu scores.
Wilyer Abreu doubles (10) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder James Outman. Jarren Duran to 3rd.
Brandon Marsh triples (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Chase DeLauter, deflected by center fielder Petey Halpin.
Travis Bazzana homers (3) on a fly ball to right field.
Steven Kwan singles on a line drive to left fielder Edmundo Sosa. Daniel Schneemann scores. David Fry to 2nd.

Rhys Hoskins doubles (9) on a ground ball to left fielder Edmundo Sosa. Chase DeLauter scores. Rhys Hoskins out at 3rd on the throw, left fielder Edmundo Sosa to second baseman Bryson Stott to catcher J.T. Realmuto to third baseman Alec Bohm.
Kyle Schwarber strikes out swinging, catcher Austin Hedges to first baseman Rhys Hoskins.
Aaron Judge homers (17) on a fly ball to right center field. Max Schuemann scores.
Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.
Richie Palacios strikes out swinging.
Aaron Judge grounds into a double play, third baseman Junior Caminero to second baseman Carson Williams to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Trent Grisham out at 2nd. Aaron Judge out at 1st.
Austin Wells grounds into a double play, shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Ryan McMahon out at 2nd. Austin Wells out at 1st.
Christopher Morel doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Tyrone Taylor.
Heriberto Hernández hits a grand slam (2) to center field. Esteury Ruiz scores. Liam Hicks scores. Xavier Edwards scores.
Kyle Stowers grounds out, second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos.
Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Graham Pauley. Brett Baty out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.
Carson Benge called out on strikes.
Salvador Perez singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Michael Massey scores. Kyle Isbel scores. Vinnie Pasquantino to 2nd.
Carter Jensen doubles (7) on a fly ball to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Vinnie Pasquantino scores. Salvador Perez scores.
Kyle Isbel singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Bryan Woo. Michael Massey to 3rd. Kyle Isbel to 2nd. Michael Massey advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Bryan Woo.
Bobby Witt Jr. flies out to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.
Julio Rodríguez homers (9) on a fly ball to left field.
Kyle Tucker triples (2) on a ground ball to right fielder Sal Frelick. Mookie Betts scores. Freddie Freeman scores.
Andrew Vaughn grounds into a double play, shortstop Mookie Betts to second baseman Hyeseong Kim to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jake Bauers out at 2nd. Andrew Vaughn out at 1st.
Andy Pages homers (11) on a fly ball to left field. Kyle Tucker scores.

Shohei Ohtani grounds out to first baseman Andrew Vaughn.
Christian Walker homers (14) on a fly ball to left center field. Nick Allen scores. Jeremy Peña scores.

Pedro Ramírez grounds into a double play, shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker. Kevin Alcántara out at 2nd. Pedro Ramírez out at 1st.
Pedro Ramírez doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith, deflected by center fielder Jake Meyers. Moisés Ballesteros scores. Carson Kelly to 3rd.
Michael Busch homers (5) on a fly ball to left center field. Pete Crow-Armstrong scores.

Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to first baseman Jose Fernandez. Jake McCarthy out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

Henry Bolte doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Gavin Sheets. Zack Gelof scores.
Ramón Laureano walks. Jackson Merrill to 2nd.
Carlos Cortes homers (5) on a fly ball to right center field.
Ty France strikes out swinging.

Chadwick Tromp strikes out swinging.
Ha-Seong Kim walks. Austin Riley to 3rd. Eli White to 2nd.
Eli White grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Andrés Chaparro. Michael Harris II out at 2nd. Eli White out at 1st.
Austin Riley singles on a line drive to left fielder James Wood. Ozzie Albies to 3rd.
Oswald Peraza grounds into a force out, fielded by second baseman Justin Foscue. Donovan Walton scores. Jo Adell out at 2nd. Oswald Peraza to 1st. Throwing error by second baseman Justin Foscue.
Jake Burger strikes out on a foul tip.
Mike Trout singles on a line drive to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Sebastián Rivero scores. Adam Frazier to 3rd.
Jake Burger homers (10) on a fly ball to center field.
Sebastián Rivero grounds out, third baseman Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger.
